	Over 1,000,000 Tons of Refrigeration of Total Plants Capacity

Bordeaux Métropole souhaite donc que les services publics de l'eau soient gérés dans un objectif d'intérêt général par une régie dotée de l'autonomie financière et de la personnalité juridique. Cette gestion publique de l'eau permet une pleine maîtrise  du service, du fonctionnement à l'investissement, sur le court comme le long terme.

Optimierung. Verantwortung. Zukunft.

WTE Wassertechnik ist einer der führenden deutschen Anbieter für kommunales und industrielles Wassermanagement. Seit mehr als 30 Jahren vertrauen mehr als 20 Millionen Menschen in 18 Ländern auf unser nachhaltiges Wissen für Abwasserentsorgung, Wasserversorgung und Behandlung von Klärschlamm.

Als Tochterunternehmen des niederösterreichischen Energiekonzerns EVN AG  führen wir vom Hauptsitz Essen aus zahlreiche Niederlassungen und Großprojekte u. a. in Europa und dem Nahen Osten. Name: Kaer
Description:
We are the CaaS people.

Cooling plays a vital role in everything we do. It provides comfort to people all over the world and enables businesses to create the products and services we all use and love.
 
But it comes at a cost. Today cooling accounts for 20% of the global electricity consumption and associated carbon emissions - and this is forecast to double by 2050.
 
Cooling-as-a-Service (CaaS) offers a better way forward and is the simplest and fastest path to low-carbon cooling for commercial and industrial real estate. 

Instead of owning and operating complex systems, businesses can outsource everything to experts and buy cooling on a pay-as-you-use basis. 

No capex. No complexity. No performance risk.

By transitioning to CaaS, building owners can cut carbon and reduce operating costs — and at the same time help accelerate a collective shift towards cleaner, more sustainable cities.
Primary Industry: Water, Waste, Steam, and Air Conditioning Services

Name: Eau du Grand Lyon
Description:
En 2020, la Métropole de Lyon a décidé la reprise en gestion publique de la production et de la distribution de l’eau potable sur les 59 communes qui composent son territoire. 

Depuis le 1er janvier 2023, Eau du Grand Lyon - société privée en délégation de service public - est devenue Eau publique du Grand Lyon, établissement public industriel et commercial (EPIC). 

Garantir sur le long terme un service public de l’eau potable de qualité pour les Grands Lyonnais, en assurant la transparence et en s’appuyant sur une implication forte des usagers : telle est la mission de notre nouvelle régie publique de l’eau.

À ce cœur de mission s’ajoutent deux ambitions majeures :
- en amont, préserver les ressources en eau et anticiper les besoins de diversification 
- en aval, garantir un accès digne à l’eau pour tous, notamment les plus démunis.

Ses missions sont assurées en lien avec les autres politiques publiques de la Métropole de Lyon, qui conserve son rôle d’autorité organisatrice.

Comptant sur la passion et l'expérience de 350 collaborateurs répartis sur 5 sites, Eau publique du Grand Lyon assure le prélèvement, la production et la distribution de 90 millions de m3 d'eau potable par an, exploite 4000 km de réseau de distribution pour délivrer à ses 370 000 abonnés et 1,4 million d’habitants une eau potable d’une grande qualité.  

Eau publique du Grand Lyon fait également partie du réseau @France Eau Publique qui regroupe les opérateurs publics de l’eau en France qui alimentent plus de 50% des abonnés sur tout le territoire. 

Les défis sont immenses, notre détermination l’est tout autant.
Primary Industry: Water, Waste, Steam, and Air Conditioning Services

Name: Ruhrverband
Description:
Der Ruhrverband ist ein öffentlich-rechtliches Wasserwirtschaftsunternehmen ohne Gewinnerzielungsabsichten. Sowohl beim Betrieb unserer Talsperren, die die Wasserversorgung von 4,6 Millionen Menschen sicherstellen, als auch bei der Abwasserreinigung für 60 Städte und Gemeinden im Einzugsgebiet von Ruhr und Lenne stehen Mensch und Umwelt im Zentrum unseres Handelns, ohne dabei das Gebot der Wirtschaftlichkeit zu vernachlässigen. 

Die Qualifikationen der Menschen, die beim Ruhrverband arbeiten, sind so vielfältig wie das Aufgabenspektrum des Unternehmens. Der Ruhrverband beschäftigt IngenieurInnen, AbwassermeisterInnen, Fachkräfte für Abwassertechnik, MonteurInnen, TechnikerInnen, Forst- und FischwirtInnen, ChemikerInnen, BiologInnen, LaborantInnen, JuristInnen, EDV-SpezialistInnen und Fachkräfte für alle Bereiche der Verwaltung. Ebenfalls vielfältig ist unser Angebot an qualifizierten Ausbildungsplätzen, mit denen der Ruhrverband jungen Menschen eine berufliche Perspektive eröffnet. 

Für HochschulabsolventInnen, StudentInnen und SchülerInnen mit Interesse an Umweltschutz werden auch Praktikumsplätze angeboten. Den wissenschaftlichen Nachwuchs unterstützen wir darüber hinaus durch das Wasserstipendium Ruhr. Neben der Ausbildung setzen wir als Ruhrverband auf die Fort- und Weiterbildung unserer Beschäftigten. Die Teilnahme an Qualifizierungsmaßnahmen steht grundsätzlich allen MitarbeiterInnen offen. Darüber hinaus hat der Ruhrverband ein spezielles Führungskräfteentwicklungsprogramm aufgelegt.

Welcome to Ecosoft – a water engineering company. 

For 30 years we produce high-quality water filtration equipment for domestic, commercial and industrial use. Started as a family business in 1991, since 2019 - a proud member of BWT Group.

We carry out the entire life cycle of products in-house: from an idea to mass production. 
We conduct turn-key projects in industrial water projects as well. 
Our end-customers enjoy first-class service via the hundreds of our partners across 60 countries of operation.

Our products and processes are certified according to global quality standards - NSF (USA), EN (EU), ACS (FR), EAC (EU) and ISO (9001, 14001, 45001).

We operate 8,000 square meters manufacturing facility in Ukraine and deliver from our warehouses in Ukraine and Belgium. 

We are 320 people, mostly engineers, including 40 WQA certified water engineers. 

Our advantages are well admired by our clients worldwide: unbeatable product range, enhanced product technology, reasonable pricing accompanied with perfect quality. 
We are online 24/7 for product and customer support. 
Become our partner today and discover the world of Ecosoft!

Gracias por ser parte de nuestro esfuerzo hacia un futuro más limpio y saludable.
_________________________________________________________

Carbotecnia manufactures and supplies advanced solutions in Activated Carbon for water, air, and fluid treatment, transforming how businesses and communities enhance their environments. With 27 years of experience, we provide a comprehensive range of purification products and services, including specialized technical consulting, installation, maintenance, and a complete supply of equipment and consumables. We focus on optimizing water and air quality for clients across Latin America and Spain, building trusted relationships and making a positive impact.

We firmly believe in social and environmental responsibility. Together with our clients, we implement sustainable solutions that meet the highest quality standards while reflecting our commitment to leaving the world better than we found it.

Thank you for being part of our effort towards a cleaner, healthier future.

Description:
Established in 2020, Alxedo combines German engineering excellence with a deep understanding of Mexico's water consumption needs. We are on a mission to make clean and sustainable drinking water accessible to everyone in Mexico. With a robust presence that includes several physical retail stores across the country, Alxedo is recognized for our innovative water purification and carbonation systems.

What We Offer:

Water Purifiers: Turn tap water into safe, drinking water with our sleek, four-stage filtration system.

Water Carbonators: Enjoy sparkling water at home without the waste of single-use plastics or the need for electricity.

Comprehensive Services: From limited edition bottles to a convenient CO2 cylinder exchange available in Mexico, we have got you covered.

Why Alxedo?

Customer Focus: Enjoy free installation and the convenience of shopping online with nationwide delivery direct to your doorstep.

Commitment to Sustainability: Join us in our fight against plastic pollution and toward promoting a healthier lifestyle.

Community and Education: Through our blogs and newsletters, we aim to educate on the importance of water conservation and its impact on both health and the environment.

With German-quality engineering and seven retail locations across Mexico, Alxedo is your go-to source for enhancing your water experience. Let's drink to a healthier planet—one sip at a time.

Description:

Our mission is to advice our Customers the best use of the smart solutions for water treatment and to promote the latest technologies available on the market.

The main products that COMS is able to supply are customized skids and compact water treatment plants completely designed and manufactured at its operative base in Italy.

The experience gained over the last years has made possible to achieve a high quality standard in the construction of equipment and plants for the treatment of waste water, thanks to a company philosophy that puts the customers’ needs at first place.

Civil field

We may supply water treatment plants for primary and sewage waters according to Customers’ engineering and specifications and on the base of our experience too.
Our core business is represented by compact MBR WWTPs in containerized configuration (new installations) or external water tanks configuration (upgrading of existing plants).
Our MBR plants are specifically designed for wastewaters produced by little communities such as:
-Small villages and hospitals
-Hotel and touristic resorts
-Golf courts and Touristic harbors
-Temporary construction sites
-Shopping malls

Industrial field

We may supply compact water treatment plants for primary, process and waste waters with particular attention to the following sectors:
-Food and beverage industries
-Slaugtherhouses
-Industrial laundries
-Manufacturing industries
-Metallurgical industries
-Chemical industries
-Landfill leachate

Name: SPL EAU DU BASSIN RENNAIS
Description:
La Ville de Rennes et la Collectivité Eau du Bassin Rennais (ancien Syndicat Mixte de Production des Eaux du Bassin Rennais [SMPBR]) ont annoncé, en janvier 2013, qu'ils souhaitaient lancer conjointement un projet de reprise en gestion publique du service de l'eau sur leur territoire. Ces deux collectivités avaient chacune délégué la production et la distribution d’eau potable à Véolia Eau dans le cadre de contrats d'affermage qui sont arrivés à échéance le 31 mars 2015. 

Cette décision a pris la forme d'une Société Publique Locale : la SPL Eau du Bassin Rennais.

Depuis le 1er avril 2015 et par délégation de service public d’une durée de 15 ans, la SPL Eau du Bassin Rennais :
-	exploite 12 ressources en eau et 7 usines de production, et produit ainsi l’eau potable pour 470 000 habitants,
-	distribue aujourd’hui aux abonnés de la Ville de Rennes, Pacé, Vezin, Saint Gilles, Cesson-Sévigné et Acigné.

Dans toutes les autres communes situées sur le territoire de la Collectivité Eau du Bassin Rennais, l’eau produite en gros par la SPL est vendue aux délégataires en charge de la distribution de l’eau à ses abonnés, jusqu’à la fin des contrats de délégation de service public.

Elle compte aujourd’hui 140 salariés.
Primary Industry: Water, Waste, Steam, and Air Conditioning Services

Name: Vertuoso Solutions
Description:
Un cercle vertueux pour capter les déchets du pluvial.

L’objectif est l’assainissement des eaux pluviales afin d’éviter une toxicité diffuse en collectant les déchets recueillis par les eaux de ruissellement, et ce, avant qu’ils ne rejoignent la mer.

Après étude du réseau existant, Vertuoso préconise et propose des systèmes de récupération des déchets. Nous avons développé une sécurité permanente, sans risque d'obstruction et de saturation du réseau pluvial en amont.
Primary Industry: Water, Waste, Steam, and Air Conditioning Services

Name: WMZS Radiant Floor Cooling/Cable Floor Heating System
Description: WMZS is an innovative company that combines science, innovative Swedish technical solutions, and thermal energy storage to meet the demand for low-energy buildings, communities, and entire cities worldwide. The concept cools and heats any building, community, and city with less energy through an ecosystem of products connected by our distribution system. It is a durable system that is easy to implement, and fully compatible with ISO standards, green buildings, and smart city standards.

Name: PTSG Water Treatment
Description:
PTSG Water Treatment lead the way in water treatment, hygiene and compliance, setting new industry standards through innovation and expertise.

A trusted partner with a collective 60 years industry experience, we ensure safer water, stricter compliance, and a sustainable future across all sectors, including:

Healthcare and NHS | Social Housing | Public Sector | Education | Commercial and Retail | Care | Industrial and Manufacturing | Leisure and Hospitality 

PTSG Water Treatment deliver successful outcomes for clients, tenants, residents and building users. We care about client success, from start to finish, providing a high-quality professional service that meets legislative requirements, as well as any specific needs for an organisation, whilst delivering a better overall value for money service.

We offer a comprehensive range of water hygiene and environmental services, including:

Planned Preventative Maintenance (PPM): Temperature monitoring, water sampling, TMV servicing, tank cleaning and disinfections, calorifier blowdowns, and shower descales | Legionella Risk Assessment Services |	Remedial Works | 	Water Treatment and Chemical Supply | Consultancy and Training | Environmental Services.

Our proven track record and client portfolio highlight our ability to deliver reliable, effective solutions tailored to the unique needs of every sector.

We hold several accreditations which demonstrate our technical competence, reliability and conformity to technical bodies when delivering Water Hygiene and Legionella prevention. 

Our team of 140+ engineers are supported by a dedicated team at our regional offices in Glasgow, Cheshire and Northamptonshire, providing administration, IT, contract management, technical, human resources and finance support.

As a business we place significant importance and investment in new innovations, technologies and sustainability.

Name: ACQUA.ecologie
Description:
ACQUA.ecologie conçoit, industrialise et déploie des solutions complètes de gestion de l’eau pour les sites à forts enjeux environnementaux, réglementaires et opérationnels : villes, industries, ports, navires, sites isolés et environnements extrêmes.
Notre différenciation repose sur une architecture technologique modulaire, capable de couvrir l’ensemble du cycle de l’eau sur site :
– traitement des eaux usées domestiques et industrielles
– réutilisation et boucles fermées
– gestion des pollutions chroniques et accidentelles
– protection active des milieux récepteurs
 ASMR – Acqua Smart Reuse constitue le socle système de cette approche : une plateforme intégrée de conception, pilotage et optimisation, orchestrant les flux, les usages, la conformité réglementaire et la performance environnementale sur l’ensemble d’un site.
 EcoGuard est une expression opérationnelle majeure de cette plateforme : une gamme dédiée à la lutte contre les pollutions portuaires et industrielles, combinant séparation, filtration avancée, rétention intelligente et déploiement terrain rapide.
 Autour de ce cœur technologique, ACQUA.ecologie déploie un portefeuille de solutions spécialisées (traitement, réutilisation, protection, supervision), conçues pour être modulaires, industrialisables et économiquement optimisées, afin de réduire les coûts globaux du cycle de vie tout en maximisant un impact environnemental mesurable.
Notre modèle combine vente de solutions, services, maintenance, supervision et formation, garantissant scalabilité, récurrence et effet plateforme, au service des SmartCity, SmartPort, GreenIndustry et infrastructures résilientes.
Primary Industry: Water, Waste, Steam, and Air Conditioning Services

Name: Expansa Inc
Description:
Headquartered in Houston, TX Expansa Inc builds on a rich tradition of commitment of providing premium water treatment services at a great value to our customers.

Expansa provides turnkey water treatment solutions to the Power, Mining, HPI, CPI, NGL, Food Processing, Semiconductor, and Municipal Industries.

Each project is customized by our multidisciplinary team to meet your specific needs.

We offer equipment, products, and services in support for industrial water processing from 50 to 2500 gpm.  Our core services are listed below:

1. Design Build Services
2. Build Own Operate Maintain (BOOM)
3. Mobile Water Systems - Bag/Cartridge Filtration, MMF, UF, NF, RO, and DI
4. Emergency Water Services
5. Operations & Care Services

Name: SRP Membranes
Description:
SRP Membranes specializes in manufacturing high-performance membranes for advanced water and wastewater treatment solutions. With over 35 years in environmental engineering and 20+ years in membrane manufacturing, we have delivered over 6,000 membrane-based systems and produced 150,000+ membranes, treating more than 3 billion litres of water. Our cutting-edge solutions are trusted by top clients, including Government PSUs like Indian Oil Corporation Limited, NTPC, and MRPL, as well as global clients from various industries.

With a growing network of company-owned offices and 20+ channel partners, we are more than just a product provider—we are a full-service solution partner in fluid Separation, Recovery, and Purification.

At Aquatech Canadian Water Services Inc., we are dedicated to empowering communities, cities, and industries to achieve their water services goals. Our expertise covers a wide spectrum of services, including the operation and maintenance of water treatment plants, technical support, and sewerage inspection. Name: Abrafrio Engenharia e Refrigeração
Description:
Desde 2004, a Abrafrio Engenharia e Refrigeração oferece soluções especializadas para empresas (PJ) nos segmentos de manutenção, climatização, refrigeração, aquecimento, ventilação e elétrica. Com sede própria em Volta Redonda/RJ, somos referência no Sul Fluminense e expandimos nossas operações para outras regiões, garantindo atendimento técnico e estratégico para empresas de diversos setores.

Contamos com um corpo técnico altamente qualificado, formado por engenheiros e técnicos experientes, que desenvolvem soluções personalizadas para cada projeto. Nosso compromisso é oferecer eficiência, inovação e qualidade, adaptando-nos às necessidades específicas de nossos clientes corporativos.

Nosso objetivo é ser um parceiro estratégico para sua empresa, entregando projetos sob medida, com excelência e confiabilidade.

Name: MIZUCHAN - WATER TREATMENT / FILTRATION
Description:
MIZUCHAN – COMPREHENSIVE WATER FILTRATION AND TREATMENT SOLUTIONS
We specialize in advanced water filtration and treatment solutions for a wide range of applications:
1. Hospitals, clinics, dental offices, and healthcare facilities
2. Factories, schools, and public infrastructure
3. Cafés, restaurants, hotels, and the F&B/Horeca sector
4. Residential homes, villas, luxury apartments
5. Treatment of saline, iron-contaminated, and hard water sources
6. Wastewater treatment for industrial and medical sectors

Subscribe to our channel to discover cutting-edge technologies, optimized solutions, and success stories from Mizuchan – where every drop of water reflects our commitment to health and the environment.

***
MIZUCHAN – GIẢI PHÁP LỌC VÀ XỬ LÝ NƯỚC TOÀN DIỆN
Chúng tôi chuyên cung cấp giải pháp lọc nước và xử lý nước chuyên sâu cho các lĩnh vực:
1. Y tế, bệnh viện, phòng khám, nha khoa.
2. Nhà máy sản xuất, trường học, công trình công cộng.
3. Quán cafe, nhà hàng, khách sạn, F&B, Horeca.
4. Dân dụng, villa, biệt thự, căn hộ cao cấp.
5. Xử lý nước nhiễm mặn, nhiễm phèn, kim loại nặng.
6. Hệ thống xử lý nước thải trong sản xuất và y tế.

Theo dõi kênh để khám phá các giải pháp tối ưu, công nghệ tiên tiến và câu chuyện thành công từ Mizuchan – nơi mỗi giọt nước là một cam kết vì sức khỏe và môi trường.

Name: NXO ENGINEERING
Description:
NXO ENGINEERING est une cleantech tissant racine dans l’agglomération de Montpellier (COURNONSEC). Elle est dédiée au développement technique et commercial de procédés innovants et automatisés dans le domaines de l aquaculture, de l’assainissement et de la decarbonation. 

Grace a la creation d un design favorisant les conditions de développement de la symbiose microalgues bactérie, nous avons mis au point des technologies de traitement des eaux usées et de decarbonation des fumées industrielles répondant au dyptique énergie positive et carbone négatif.

Lauréat du concours i nov de l Ademe en 2021 et labellisé Greentech innovation par le ministère de la transition écologique en 2022, nous avons fait la démonstration du caractère opérationnel des technologies proposées par la mise au point de démonstrateurs industriel en 2019.

Osons les algues.
Primary Industry: Water, Waste, Steam, and Air Conditioning Services
